name: linInvertMultipleHeaderBits
title: linInvertMultipleHeaderBits
syntax: dword linInvertMultipleHeaderBits(dword byteIndices[],dword bitIndices[],dword numberOfDisturbedBits[],dword levels[],dword arrSize)
description: Inverts the multiple bits in specified locations in the next LIN header.
Some driver versions only support inverting multiple (consecutive) bits in one position (arrSize == 1).

parameters.name: byteIndices
parameters.description: An array of the index of the bytes.

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.
